summary: The diff implements the majority of the requested requirements: dark-mode theme (REQ-1), AppShell with SideNavigation/BottomNavigation (REQ-2), VerticalClipPreview (REQ-3), CaptionEditor and Scheduler (REQ-4), TrendingPage (REQ-5), ContentManager (REQ-6), backend system controls (REQ-7), AdminPanel with SystemControls/AppAnalytics/UserStatusManagement (REQ-8), and backend batch deletion/stats functions (REQ-9). Several specific acceptance criteria have gaps, particularly around ContentManager role-gating (manager role), creator info on trending cards, and the activity log auto-refresh polling interval.

missing_requirements.requirement: Page is gated to manager/admin/owner roles; other users see an access denied message
missing_requirements.reason: ContentManager.tsx only checks for 'admin' or 'owner' roles (isAuthorized = roleStr === 'admin' || roleStr === 'owner'). The 'manager' role is not included in the authorization check, contrary to the spec which requires manager/admin/owner access.

missing_requirements.requirement: All mutations use existing useContentEntries hooks
missing_requirements.reason: ContentManager.tsx defines its own local useContentEntries, useCreateContentEntry, useUpdateContentEntry, and useDeleteContentEntry hooks inline rather than importing from a shared existing hooks file, violating the constraint to use existing hooks.

missing_requirements.requirement: Each clip card displays title, creator identifier, score, and rank badge
missing_requirements.reason: TrendingPage.tsx displays title, score, and rank badge but no creator identifier. The TrendingClipAnalytics type does not include a creator field and no creator info is rendered in the trending list.

missing_requirements.requirement: Activity log table auto-refreshes every 15 seconds and is searchable
missing_requirements.reason: ActivityLogTable.tsx source is not present in the diff. There is no visible evidence that the activity log polling interval is set to 15 seconds or that a search feature is implemented.

missing_requirements.requirement: Scheduler allows selecting a clip using existing hooks rather than duplicating logic
missing_requirements.reason: Scheduler.tsx defines its own local useClips hook inline rather than importing the existing useClips hook from hooks/useClips.ts, violating the constraint against duplicating logic.

hallucinated_features.description: backend/migration.mo file defining OldActor/NewActor types and a migration run function
hallucinated_features.reason: The build request does not mention any data migration module or migration.mo file. This is a new file added without being requested.

hallucinated_features.description: SystemStatus type with #running/#restarting/#shutting_down variants and a systemStatus mutable variable in backend/main.mo
hallucinated_features.reason: The build request specifies only that shutdown logs the event and restart resets counters. A SystemStatus enum tracking live system state is not mentioned anywhere in the requirements.
